instructions_coverage.notes: All 10 instructions are exercised across the three scenarios. Scenario-01 covers GWT format, measurable outcomes, negative scenarios, out-of-scope, checkbox format, no vague criteria, and no implementation details. Scenario-02 covers rule-oriented format, boundary conditions, error visibility, and scope constraints. Scenario-03 covers INVEST checks, story rewriting, and measurable criteria for the rewritten story. Stakeholder alignment (I10) and single-behaviour coupling (I08) are implicit in all three scenarios but not individually scored, accounting for the 15% gap.
